_doc: Phase 1 + Phase 4 — explicit allowlist of schema names whose handler value is intentionally None. Two parallel shapes: `none_handlers` (array — used by Phase 1's test_tool_audit invariants) and `reasons` (dict — used by Phase 4's test_every_tool_resolves to surface per-entry justification when CI runs). Any schema with a None handler that is NOT in this list ⇒ ghost (CI fails). Any name in this list that has a callable handler ⇒ stale fixture (CI fails).

explain_error.reason: handled inline by LLM reasoning, no execution

ros2_connect.reason: conditional None when ros-mcp not installed; live handler when installed
ros2_connect.planned_status: ships with ros-mcp install in production environments
